flex_fields: {"1211898465243458": {"name": "Status C-week", "value": "Green - On track"}, "1209637014993158": {"name": "Notes - Task", "value": "Phase One of the MCS Landing Page Optimization initiative officially launched in March 2026 with testing beginning in FR on 3/3 and expanding to EU4 in W11, following successful testing in Canada. name: Portfolio Consolidation
AMO Objective Change Test
flex_fields: {"1211898465243458": {"name": "Status C-week", "value": "Green - On track"}, "1209637014993158": {"name": "Notes - Task", "value": "The implementation was initiated for a subset of IT portfolios on 1/5, with the remaining portfolios migrated on 1/15. Following the implementation of the new feed, data discrepancies between our dashboard and AMO decreased from -23% to +6% avg in IT, significantly improving reporting accuracy and insight quality. While the bidding objective change in IT has not yet driven incremental lift, the enhanced data reliability positions us well for more informed optimization decisions. We have also transitioned our reporting to align with the new registrations objective (and transitioned the portfolios currently using Daily spend target to the new objectives in EU2 on 3/3/26). Data will continue to inform optimizations post OCI implementation."}, "1211898253103683": {"name": "Help Needed flag", "value": "No"}, "1211898253103663": {"name": "Impact (EU Reg)", "value": "0"}, "1211898253103687": {"name": "Status L-week", "value": "Green - On track"}}

name: Evidence Based Ad Copy Test
flex_fields: {"1211898465243458": {"name": "Status C-week", "value": "Green - On track"}, "1209637014993158": {"name": "Notes - Task", "value": "Evidence-based ad copy testing is currently underway in the UK (launched 1/29) and IT (launched 2/19).
